name: handler
description: Runs a SQL query against a file using DuckDB

path.description:
The path to the database (optional).  
If none is provided or the path is invalid, an in-memony database will be used

bindings.description: An optional list of variables to be bound into the query. Defaults to [].

bind_path.description: Determines whether to bind the passed path to the query.  defaults to true
